name: Skagway Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 25.5 Inch Height - LIT4289 - Black/Shell - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Skagway 25.5 inch black shell table lamp set. These beautiful lamps bring a harmonious blend of style and functionality to your home. Crafted with a focus on detail, each lamp features a captivating shell material that adds a unique texture and a modern touch to your decor. The combination of black and shell colors complements various design themes, allowing for easy integration into any room. Whether placed on your bedside table or living room console, these lamps provide a warm, inviting glow that enhances the ambiance. Elevate your interior with this set and experience the perfect balance of elegance and practicality in your lighting solution.
